_comment: Example RunConfig control-panel / --run-config override file. The backend contract is this JSON shape and nothing else (MASTER_EXECUTION_PLAN §1.3 surface b). 'panel' values are explicit overrides that beat prompt-parsed and env; 'parsed' entries are [value, verbatim_prompt_span] pairs the S0 extractors would have produced. Keys are knob ids from config/settings/run_config_knobs.yaml.
